Fendi FF embossed wool jacket crafted from custom luxurious double-weave cashmere and silk fabric in an elegant smoky gray tone, blending a sense of aged charm and sophistication. The signature FF embossed letters adorn the chest, while the inner lining features a hidden FF pattern, revealing understated luxury within. 

Printed using digital direct injection technology, the original design is converted into digital signals and dyes are sprayed directly onto the fabric for high-resolution detail. High-temperature embossing precisely controls heat and pressure to rearrange fiber chains, creating a three-dimensional FF textured effect. 

The jacket features meticulous double-lip hidden welt pocket craftsmanship: positioning, stitching, cutting, shaping, sewing, hidden lining insertion, and final pressing are all done entirely by hand without machine presser foot intervention. The open seam technique is also hand-executed, forming pocket openings with double parallel welt lips and an internal invisible support structure, uniting function and aesthetics.

Available sizes: 46, 48, 50, 52.

Fendi FF Hooded Sweatshirt with Nylon Water-Based Penetration Print features a special printing technique using water-based ink on nylon fabric. Fendi Bear Embroidered Hoodie features a 26S double yarn + 10S fish scale composite structure, providing a sculptural stiffness. The fish scale weave creates a unique textured surface, softened by brushing for a cloud-like, skin-friendly feel. Cuffs and hem use 21S double yarn 1x1 ribbing with high weight for excellent elasticity and shape retention. Innovative triple technique combines jacquard weaving, applique embroidery, and dense 16-stitch-per-inch satin stitching: FF pattern is jacquard woven into the brown base; applique embroidery adds visual layers; satin stitching seamlessly bonds decoration to fabric, enhancing edge strength and pattern clarity. The dropped shoulder, loose fit breaks traditional lines for a relaxed street style. Hood and front pocket add practicality. All seams reinforced with visible lockstitch to maintain structure during wear. Sizes XS-L.

Fendi Bear Embroidered Crew Neck Short-Sleeve T-Shirt, made from 32s single yarn double-faced fabric, weighing 280g/m². The 32s yarn ensures a fine texture and firmness, while the 280g weight provides excellent structure and drape, resisting wrinkles and deformation. The 25% polyester blend significantly enhances fabric strength, wrinkle resistance, and shape retention, making it more durable and less prone to shrinkage than pure cotton. The 75% cotton offers softness, breathability, and moisture absorption.

The FF pattern is jacquard-woven with multicolored yarns, seamlessly integrated into the patch base for permanent 3D effect and superior colorfastness. The jacquard patch is appliquéd onto the chest using embroidery, creating a large, textured decorative area that forms a strong visual focus and depth. Edge satin stitching secures all patch edges, preventing curling or detachment, greatly improving durability. The neat stitching also outlines and enhances the FF logo, elevating craftsmanship.

Overall stitching is straight and delicate. The fabric is soft and comfortable with consistent color and no shading. Matches well with the same style for fashionable looks suitable for various occasions. Custom trims included. Complete triple labels. Unisex. Sizes XS-L.

Fendi Embossed Pocket Knit Sweater  
Crafted from premium soft cotton-wool blend with cloud-like elasticity, offering delicate softness and natural sheen.  
Set against a deep black base, it embodies a refined fusion of depth and elegance.  
Features the iconic FF logo embossed on the chest pocket, full in shape, subtly revealing brand rhythm within the understated black tone.  
The pocket detail exudes unique charm, embodying minimalist contemporary luxury and versatile style.  

Made using embossing and filling technology: molds replicate original patterns in various sizes, low-temperature pressing shapes the design, then filled with cushioning foam. Sealed with hot-melt glue for fine texture and full form, enhancing visual impact.  

Complex curved rib knit structure achieved by varying stitch techniques and yarn arrangement, creating curved yarn distribution.  
Garment undergoes softening and deodorizing wash with professional equipment and detergents, improving feel and appearance.

Coordinates well with matching pieces for fashionable looks, suitable for all occasions.

Fendi 2025FW new deep blue cotton T-shirt features 32s single yarn double-faced fabric, woven at high density with 68 loops per inch for stable structure. The heavyweight fabric maintains sculptural shape dynamically without deformation. Double-faced uniform texture ensures consistent fine grain on both sides. The pattern uses a three-layer composite technique: laser-cut custom yarn-dyed fabric patch base, interfaced mid-layer for stiffness, and five-color chain stitch embroidery top layer for 3D shaping. High colorfast mercerized cotton threads are densely stitched at 12 stitches per inch, creating embossed edges. The contrasting color scheme is precisely calibrated, keeping patch and thread color difference within brightness levels. The overall pattern shows subtle gradient steps, adding visual depth on the deep blue base. All stitching matches the color of corresponding pattern blocks. Sizes: XS-L.

Fendi FF Nylon Down Hooded Jacket features custom aviation-grade 75D thermal-lock nylon and new national standard 90% white duck down with ample fill. The iconic FF motif is crafted into tactile, flowing pleats. Computer-controlled mechanical filling ensures precise down weight per square, verified by inner lining patterns for 3D effect accuracy. The double F jacquard pattern is woven by varying yarn interlacing and multiple dyeing processes for color fidelity. CNC laser-cut panels use high-energy laser beams for exact shapes with seamless laser edging. Zero-chamber direct fill and 5D embossing involve special coating for an invisible down-lock barrier, low-temp high-pressure molding, and five-layer functional fabric coatings. Computer template stitching guarantees precise, smooth lines per design. Sizes: 46-52 (S-XL).
